globalStylePrefix: Orthographic top-down battlemap, 2d game map, Hyper Light Drifter, raster graphics, sharp details,
globalStyleSuffix: distinct ground texture, scattered small details, no characters, no monsters, no UI, no HUD, game background asset, consistent lighting
negativePrompt: 3d render, isometric, perspective, horizon, sky, vanishing point, close-up, macro, blur, depth of field, bokeh, character, ui, text, vector art, smooth, painting, blurry, low quality, realistic photo, people, monsters, watermark, signature, frame, border, side view, first person, low resolution, jpeg artifacts

B1.description: Dark underground cavern with slime pools, glowing mushrooms, stalactites, wet rocky surfaces, eerie green glow, boss lair atmosphere. Exit path on the bottom edge leading to grassy outdoors with visible daylight
